ddls:
CREATE TABLE "annotation_releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation release */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the annotation release (e.g., current, archived) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation release was published */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the release, including changes and improvements */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the release was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the release was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assemblies" (
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genome assembly */,
  "assembly_name" TEXT /* Name of the genome assembly */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the genome assembly */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the annotation release */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Name of the organism the assembly belongs to */,
  "assembly_type" TEXT /* Type of the assembly (e.g., primary, alternative) */,
  "assembly_size" TEXT /* Size of the assembly in base pairs */,
  "assembly_source" TEXT /* Source of the assembly data (e.g., NCBI, ENA) */,
  "assembly_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the assembly (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assembly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assemblies_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES annotation_releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chromosomes" (
  "chr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chromosome */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genome assembly */,
  "chr_number" INTEGER /* Chromosome number */,
  "chr_name" TEXT /* Name of the chromosome */,
  "chr_length" TEXT /* Length of the chromosome in base pairs */,
  "chr_type" TEXT /* Type of the chromosome (e.g., autosome, sex chromosome) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chromosomes_assembly_id FOREIGN KEY ("assembly_id") REFERENCES assemblies ("assembly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic location */,
  "chr_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chromosome */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Starting position of the annotation on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* Ending position of the annotation on the chromosome */,
  "accession_number" TEXT /* Accession number of the annotated sequence */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand of the genomic location (e.g., +, -) */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene associated with the location */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the gene associated with the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_chr_id FOREIGN KEY ("chr_id") REFERENCES chromosomes ("chr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genomic location */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of the annotation (e.g., gene, variant) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the annotation */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the gene associated with the annotation */,
  "transcript_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the transcript associated with the annotation */,
  "protein_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the protein associated with the annotation */,
  "annotation_source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation data (e.g., RefSeq, Gencode) */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assembly_annotations" (
  "assembly_annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between an assembly and an annotation */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genome assembly */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the annotation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the association was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the association was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assembly_annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assembly_annotations_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES annotations ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assembly_annotations_assembly_id FOREIGN KEY ("assembly_id") REFERENCES assemblies ("assembly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, genome analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the annotation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session during which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES annotations ("annotation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation version */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the annotation */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the annotation */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last modified */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_versions_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES annotations ("annotation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assembly_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assembly version */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genome assembly */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the assembly */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last modified */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assembly_versions_assembly_id FOREIGN KEY ("assembly_id") REFERENCES assemblies ("assembly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation change */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the annotation version */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_changes_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES annotation_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assembly_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assembly change */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assembly version */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assembly_changes_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES assembly_versions ("version_id")
)
